scenes.title: A Light at the Window
scenes.text: Nova is building a cardboard rocket when a tiny star falls into the garden. It whispers, “I lost my way home.”

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Check the backyard launch pad
choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Find the Rocket Key in your desk

scenes.title: Stella the Star
scenes.text: The tiny star’s name is Stella. She belongs to the Sky Garden beyond the Moon. Nova promises to help.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Head to the rocket pad
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Ask Stella for a starlight map

scenes.title: The Rocket Key
scenes.text: Inside Nova’s desk drawer is a shiny toy key. When Stella touches it, the key turns into a real Rocket Key.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Go to the glowing rocket pad
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Tell Stella about the key

scenes.title: The Backyard Launch Pad
scenes.text: Behind the house, Nova’s cardboard rocket now glows with silver lines. The door is locked, and the stars seem to be waiting.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Climb to the neighbor's roof

scenes.title: The Starlight Map
scenes.text: Stella draws a map in the air: Moon Station, Comet Bridge, Planet of Colors, and finally the Sky Garden.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Launch from the rocket pad
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Plan the trip with Stella

scenes.title: The Neighbor’s Roof
scenes.text: Nova climbs carefully to the neighbor’s roof. The rocket is still locked below, but Nova sees a satellite flashing a pattern.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Climb down to the rocket pad

scenes.title: Robo-Bip’s Signal
scenes.text: A tiny robot voice comes through an old walkie-talkie: “Beep! I can help navigate, but I need a battery.”

choice_labels.Shield: 🛡️ Shield — Search the toolbox for a battery
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Return to the rocket pad

scenes.title: The Spare Battery
scenes.text: Nova finds a spare battery in the toolbox. Robo-Bip wakes up fully and downloads the safest route to the rocket.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Launch with Robo-Bip's help

scenes.title: The Rocket Door
scenes.text: The rocket door shines. Nova can open it with the Rocket Key or ask Stella to guide the controls with starlight.

choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Open the rocket with the Rocket Key
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Let Stella guide the controls
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Run a safety check first

scenes.title: Safety First
scenes.text: Nova checks the helmet, seatbelt, oxygen meter, and snack pocket. Stella giggles. “Every explorer needs snacks.”

choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Board and launch the rocket
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Blast off into space

scenes.title: Lift Off!
scenes.text: The rocket rises above the clouds. Earth becomes a blue marble below. Stella glows brighter, but a red light blinks on the control panel.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Check the blinking control panel
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Speed toward the Comet Bridge

scenes.title: The Blinking Button
scenes.text: The panel says: “Navigation unstable.” Robo-Bip suggests turning the silver dial slowly, not quickly.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Navigate carefully to Moon Station
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Steer toward the Comet Bridge

scenes.title: Moon Station
scenes.text: At Moon Station, moon rabbits bounce in slow motion. Their telescope is stuck, and without it, they cannot point to the Sky Garden.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Fly to the Comet Bridge

scenes.title: Moon Rabbits
scenes.text: The moon rabbits offer Nova a Moon Carrot and say, “Kind travelers always find shorter paths.”

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Continue to the Comet Bridge

scenes.title: Fixing the Telescope
scenes.text: Nova uses the Rocket Key as a tiny screwdriver. The telescope turns toward a bridge made of comet dust.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Cross the Comet Bridge
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Visit the Planet of Colors

scenes.title: The Comet Bridge
scenes.text: The bridge sparkles but breaks apart whenever the rocket moves too fast. Nova must choose carefully.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Speed through the meteor mist
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Fly to the Planet of Colors

scenes.title: Slow and Steady
scenes.text: Nova slows the rocket and uses the shield field. The comet dust becomes solid under the rocket.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Continue to the Planet of Colors

scenes.title: Meteor Mist
scenes.text: Nova speeds ahead and enters a mist of tiny meteors. The rocket shakes, and Robo-Bip drops a bolt.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Push on to the Planet of Colors

scenes.title: The Planet of Colors
scenes.text: The planet is covered in singing flowers. Each color makes a different sound. Stella says the Sky Garden gate needs a friendly song.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Fly straight to the Sky Garden gate

scenes.title: The Color Creatures
scenes.text: Small rainbow creatures gather around Nova. They are shy, but they smile when Nova offers the Moon Carrot.

choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Sing with the rainbow creatures
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Head to the Sky Garden gate

scenes.title: The Friendly Song
scenes.text: Nova, Stella, Robo-Bip, and the rainbow creatures sing together. A path of light appears, pointing to the Sky Garden.

choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Open the Sky Garden gate
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Fly to the shining gate

scenes.title: The Sky Garden Gate
scenes.text: A huge silver gate floats between the stars. It opens only when a traveler brings light, kindness, and a song.

choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Open the gate with song and kindness
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Light the gate with star magic
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Rest and try again tomorrow

scenes.title: Golden Ending
scenes.text: The gate opens wide. Stella joins thousands of happy stars in the Sky Garden. Nova receives a tiny star badge and returns home before breakfast.

scenes.title: Bright Ending
scenes.text: Nova’s kindness lights the gate, but the song is missing. Stella reaches the garden with help from Robo-Bip’s signal.

scenes.title: Soft Ending
scenes.text: Nova is too tired to open the gate. Stella rests in the rocket’s lantern, and they promise to try again tomorrow.
